title: Ride educated horses to carry out basic stock work
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Ride educated horses to carry out basic stock work demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Maintain horse health and condition

pcs.text: Monitor horses for signs of ill health, injury, poor condition or behavioural issues as part of daily routine

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Monitor horses for signs of ill health, injury, poor condition or behavioural issues as part of daily routine.

pcs.text: Report horse condition to supervisor
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Report horse condition to supervisor?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Report horse condition to supervisor.

pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Administer preventative health treatments or remedial treatments for common ailments safely and humanely under supervision of veterinarian or supervisor?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Administer preventative health treatments or remedial treatments for common ailments safely and humanely under supervision of veterinarian or supervisor.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Carry out hoof cleaning, check for issues or injuries and apply treatments according to safe workplace practices.

pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Apply workplace biosecurity and sustainability policies and procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Apply workplace biosecurity and sustainability policies and procedures.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Prepare and use equipment according to supervisor instructions and safe working practices.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify workplace health and safety hazards, report to supervisor, and implement control measures for working safely with horses.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select, fit, use and maintain personal protective equipment (PPE) applicable to the task.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify horses by sex, colour, markings and brands.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Safely and humanely catch assigned horse, check for health, injury and soundness, and report any issues to supervisor.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Confirm with supervisor that the assigned horse is suitable for required work and own skill level.

pcs.text: Prepare horse for ridden work including a pre-exercise groom

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Prepare horse for ridden work including a pre-exercise groom.

pcs.text: Check and report faulty or unsafe equipment or PPE to supervisor
